title: lobelia gracilis
intro: Lobelia gracilis, also known as Indian tobacco, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Lobeliaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a stimulant, expectorant, and antispasmodic. The health benefits of Lobelia gracilis include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as easing symptoms of coughs, colds, and flu. Lobelia gracilis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
